requirement_topic.en: OCPP Readiness, EMC, and Power Quality for Small Island Grids
requirement_topic.zh: OCPP准备、EMC及小岛国电网电能质量
requirement_topic.zht: OCPP準備、EMC及小島國電網電能質量

summary.en: Samoa does not appear to have a mature national public EV charging network. For public, fleet, resort, government, donor-funded, or utility-connected chargers, project specifications may require OCPP back-office interoperability, remote monitoring, fault reporting, load management, metering, and cybersecurity controls. EMC and power-quality evidence should be prepared against IEC 61000-family practice because chargers are high-power electronic loads on a small island grid with renewable generation. Harmonics, flicker, voltage dips, conducted and radiated emissions, immunity, and demand-management behaviour should be reviewed before EPC connection acceptance.
summary.zh: 萨摩亚似乎尚无成熟的全国公共电动汽车充电网络。对于公共、车队、度假村、政府、援助资金或接入公用事业的充电桩，项目规范可能要求OCPP后台互操作、远程监控、故障报告、负载管理、计量和网络安全控制。由于充电桩是接入小岛国可再生能源电网的大功率电子负载，EMC和电能质量证据应按IEC 61000系列实践准备。EPC接入验收前，应审查谐波、闪变、电压暂降、传导和辐射发射、抗扰度及需求管理行为。
summary.zht: 薩摩亞似乎尚無成熟的全國公共電動汽車充電網絡。對於公共、車隊、度假村、政府、援助資金或接入公用事業的充電樁，項目規範可能要求OCPP後台互操作、遠程監控、故障報告、負載管理、計量和網絡安全控制。由於充電樁是接入小島國可再生能源電網的大功率電子負載，EMC和電能質量證據應按IEC 61000系列實踐準備。EPC接入驗收前，應審查諧波、閃變、電壓暫降、傳導和輻射發射、抗擾度及需求管理行為。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61000 series - electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
OCPP - Open Charge Point Protocol for networked EV charging
IEC 61851-24 - DC charging digital communication where CCS2 is used
Project-specific EPC, owner, charge-point-operator, and donor technical specifications

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 communication between the off-board charger and the battery management system. That CAN-based vehicle communication is not OCPP back-office interoperability and is not the CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 communication route. China AC and DC chargers may include proprietary or OCPP-capable network functions depending on operator requirements, but those functions must be proven against the Samoa project back-office, load-management, EMC, and power-quality requirements.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023作为非车载充电机与电池管理系统之间的通信。该CAN总线车辆通信并不等同于OCPP后台互操作，也不是CCS2 / IEC 61851-24通信路径。中国交流和直流充电桩可根据运营商要求包含私有或支持OCPP的联网功能，但这些功能必须针对萨摩亚项目后台、负载管理、EMC和电能质量要求进行证明。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023作為非車載充電機與電池管理系統之間的通訊。該CAN總線車輛通訊並不等同於OCPP後台互操作，也不是CCS2 / IEC 61851-24通訊路徑。中國交流和直流充電樁可根據運營商要求包含私有或支持OCPP的聯網功能，但這些功能必須針對薩摩亞項目後台、負載管理、EMC和電能質量要求進行證明。

gap.en: Exporters must confirm the OCPP version, SIM/router/modem approvals, local telecom compatibility, remote diagnostics, payment or access-control integration, offline behaviour, cybersecurity settings, and load-management rules required by the Samoa project. For EPC acceptance, provide IEC 61000 EMC reports, harmonic data, power-factor data, fault ride-through or restart behaviour where relevant, and commissioning test procedures. A charger with only GB/T 27930 DC communication and no project-compatible OCPP back office cannot be assumed ready for Samoa public or fleet deployments.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认萨摩亚项目要求的OCPP版本、SIM/路由器/调制解调器审批、本地电信兼容性、远程诊断、支付或访问控制集成、离线行为、网络安全设置及负载管理规则。为配合EPC验收，应提供IEC 61000 EMC报告、谐波数据、功率因数数据、适用时的故障穿越或重启行为，以及调试测试程序。仅支持GB/T 27930直流通信且无项目兼容OCPP后台的充电桩，不能假定可用于萨摩亚公共或车队部署。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認薩摩亞項目要求的OCPP版本、SIM/路由器/調製解調器審批、本地電信兼容性、遠程診斷、支付或訪問控制集成、離線行為、網絡安全設置及負載管理規則。為配合EPC驗收，應提供IEC 61000 EMC報告、諧波數據、功率因數數據、適用時的故障穿越或重啟行為，以及調試測試程序。僅支持GB/T 27930直流通訊且無項目兼容OCPP後台的充電樁，不能假定可用於薩摩亞公共或車隊部署。

mandatory_status.target: Project mandatory where OCPP, remote monitoring, EMC, power-quality, metering, or load-management requirements are specified by EPC, the project owner, fleet operator, telecom authority, or charge-point operator
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is China domestic DC vehicle communication and is not an OCPP or CCS2 communication substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Samoa public or fleet chargers should be treated as project-defined network equipment: confirm OCPP, telecom, EMC, harmonic, and load-management requirements before shipment. GB/T 27930 alone is not back-office interoperability and is not a CCS2 communication substitute.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 萨摩亚公共或车队充电桩应按项目定义的联网设备处理：出货前确认OCPP、电信、EMC、谐波和负载管理要求。单独的GB/T 27930并不等同于后台互操作，也不能替代CCS2通信。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 薩摩亞公共或車隊充電樁應按項目定義的聯網設備處理：出貨前確認OCPP、電信、EMC、諧波和負載管理要求。單獨的GB/T 27930並不等同於後台互操作，也不能替代CCS2通訊。
